problem id: d8e070fa
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(4) AND NOT SHR(6)) XOR NOT SHL(3)

examples:
  10001100 -> 01010111
  11000100 -> 10010011
  10010001 -> 01101110
  11001101 -> 01001011
  10000011 -> 11011111
  01100101 -> 10000001
  11001000 -> 00110011
  01011101 -> 11000011

query: 11011111
predicted answer: 11111011
